candidate.name: Trafilatura
candidate.butler_skill_shape: web article extraction, cleanup, metadata capture, source note generation
why_recommended: Good fit for turning arbitrary pages into clean text for downstream summarization and archival.
Works well as a shared primitive under web-note, forum snapshot, and research ingestion skills.
risks: Dynamic sites and login walls still need browser automation or a secondary fetch path.
Needs source attribution rules in Butler output.
